ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies the patient has */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Significant family medical history */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Patient's smoking status (e.g., smoker, non-smoker, former smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Patient's alcohol consumption (e.g., non-drinker, light drinker, heavy drinker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biomarkers" (
  "biomarker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biomarker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the biomarker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biomarker */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the biomarker */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Normal reference range for the biomarker */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the biomarker */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the biomarker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biomarker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biomarker_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the data belongs to */,
  "biomarker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biomarker being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the biomarker */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the biomarker was measured */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the biomarker was measured (e.g., hospital, clinic, home) */,
  "measurement_device" TEXT /* Device used for measurement */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Indicates whether quality control was performed and the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomarker_data_biomarker_id FOREIGN KEY ("biomarker_id") REFERENCES biomarkers ("biomarker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomarker_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., medication, surgery, therapy) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Who administered the treatment (e.g., doctor, nurse, self) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., observational, randomized controlled trial) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, planned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the patient is participating in */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient participating in the study */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient enrolled in the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the patient in the study (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the patient has given consent to participate in the study */,
  "withdrawal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal if the patient drops out of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biomarker_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the analysis is part of */,
  "biomarker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biomarker being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomarker_analysis_biomarker_id FOREIGN KEY ("biomarker_id") REFERENCES biomarkers ("biomarker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomarker_analysis_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
